feature_descriptions.command_rate: requests per master over the window (baseline vs. flood)
feature_descriptions.exception_rate: exception responses per master over the window (illegal-function probing)
feature_descriptions.new_master: boolean: first time this source addresses this slave
feature_descriptions.quantity: number of registers / coils touched (bulk write)
feature_descriptions.register_address: target register / coil address (writes to control ranges)
feature_descriptions.unit_id: frequency-encoded unit / slave id (unexpected target device)
feature_descriptions.write_flag: boolean: a write function (write single/multiple coil/register)

schema_description: Suricata Modbus ICS set: function code, write/address/quantity tampering, behavioral rates
